howItWorks.intro: This national debt per capita calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Debt per Capita = Total National Debt / Population
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much national debt does each American owe?
faq.answer: With $34.5 trillion in national debt and 335 million people, each person's share is about $103,000. Per taxpayer (about 150 million), it is roughly $230,000.
